meaning: n.膨胀物adj.膨胀的,因膨胀而变形的
examples: An air dry dilatant fire-proof coatings has been developed with a optimized formulation.
Constitutive equations for the viscoelastic-dilatant behaviour of rocks are presented. The dilatancy parameters are determined from various triaxial tests.
A transparent dilatant fireproof coating was prepared, based on a modified urea-formaldehyde resin as binder, and phosphoric acid and starch as fire retardant.
